channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: 吃了传说中的椰枣，刚开始吃不以为然，吃完后没多久感觉后劲十足：很甜。 https://t.co/p8t1r4tDvN
item.author: @tualatrix

item.title:
MCPorter 🧳 0.9.0 is out. Call MCPs from TypeScript or as CLI
- per-server tool filtering - sturdier...
item.description:
MCPorter 🧳 0.9.0 is out. Call MCPs from TypeScript or as CLI
- per-server tool filtering - sturdier stdio shutdowns - Windows OAuth URL quoting fix - OAuth config docs - schema-declared string coercion for tool calls https://t.co/aywv0xs0Hf
--- @steipete | ❤️ 57 | 🔁 4 | 💬 8 | 👁 4416
item.author: @steipete

item.title: Great post. I agree with all of it. However, I still remain an optimist.
item.author: @tunguz
